ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Continued To Nov-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Continued To Sep-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-14-2021 Continued To Aug-11-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Porter, via ZOOM, for Jennifer Quigley, Administrator.

The court begins by requesting confirmation from counsel of his client's first name. Counsel confirms that it is Jennifer. The court and counsel discuss the issues with this matter including but not limited to the court not having a disclaimer on file for Thomas Quigley and the Administrator making distributions without any prior authority from the court to do so. The court confirms with counsel that all estate assets are in estate accounts. The court then advises counsel that the court will require a formal disclaimer from Thomas Quigley in order for this matter to move forward. Counsel confirms that he intends to submit a disclaimer to the court for filing, this week.

The Accounting Petition is continued to August 11, 2011, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Balmy. Not reported.
